allow: Bash(sed 's#</body></html>#<script>\\nwindow.addEventListener\("load", function\(\){\\n setTimeout\(function\(\){\\n var summary = function\(\){ return [].map.call\(document.querySelectorAll\(".plotly-graph-div"\), function\(gd\){ return gd.data.map\(function\(t\){ return t.visible === false ? 0 : 1; }\).join\(""\); }\).join\("|"\); };\\n var before = summary\(\);\\n document.querySelector\(".gsel input[value=\\\\"1\\\\"]"\).checked = false;\\n window.__applyGlobalSelect\(\).then\(function\(\){\\n var el = document.createElement\("div"\); el.id = "test-out";\\n el.textContent = "BEFORE=" + before + " AFTER=" + summary\(\);\\n document.body.appendChild\(el\);\\n }\);\\n }, 1500\);\\n}\);\\n</script></body></html>#' proto_board.html)
